name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Smart Lock U100'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

rechargeable.description: Whether the device has a built-in rechargeable battery.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating for outdoor use, e.g. 'IP65'.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

access_methods.description: Methods supported for unlocking. keypad = PIN code entry, rfid_card = NFC or RFID card.

auto_lock.description: Whether the lock automatically re-locks after a set time.

tamper_alert.description: Whether the lock sends an alert if someone tries to tamper with or force it.

door_thickness_min_mm.description: Minimum supported door thickness in millimeters.

door_thickness_max_mm.description: Maximum supported door thickness in millimeters.
